step.title: Gather context
step.action: Load any available research artifacts: brainstorm transcript, market research, domain research, tech research, elicitation report.
If no artifacts exist, gather context directly from the user.

step.title: Define vision and goals
step.action: Articulate the product vision: what does the product do and why does it matter?
Define measurable goals aligned with the vision.

step.title: Identify target users
step.action: Define target user personas with demographics, needs, pain points, and usage patterns.

step.title: List key features
step.action: Enumerate key features with priority levels (must-have, should-have, nice-to-have).
Map each feature to a user need or goal.

step.title: Define success metrics
step.action: Define quantifiable success metrics and KPIs for launch and post-launch.

step.title: Document constraints
step.action: Document technical, business, regulatory, and timeline constraints.

step.title: Produce brief
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections comprehensively.
